meta.title: The US Navy goes all-in on DRONE FIGHTERS
meta.description:
The US Navy just dove into the fighter drone deep end, awarding developmental contracts for new carrier-based drone fighters to Anduril, Northrop Grumman, Boeing, and General Atomics. We’ve also learned from a recently released slide from a Navy’s Collaborative Combat Aircraft office that Lockheed Martin was also awarded a contract to develop the common control architecture for these carrier-based CCAs.
